# API Reference

## Overview

The API provides programmatic access to the parser for integration with build tools and
content workflows.

## Functions

| Function | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `parse_file` | Parse a single Markdown or HTML file. |
| `parse_files` | Parse multiple files and aggregate results. |
